name: tabs
description: A set of panels shown one at a time, switched by a row of tabs sharing a single tab stop.

requires.roles.controls: each tab has aria-controls referencing its tabpanel
requires.states.selected: aria-selected set to true on the active tab, false on the rest
requires.focus.roving: one tab stop into the tablist; only the active tab is in the page Tab sequence
requires.keyboard.ArrowLeft: moves focus to the previous tab, wrapping to the last
requires.keyboard.ArrowRight: moves focus to the next tab, wrapping to the first
